title: Daily Source Digest
note: Daily source-balanced news digest — morning update.

stories.title: 'Indirect' Qatar Talks with Iran Conclude Quietly, with No Breakthrough on Strait of Hormuz
stories.summary:
'Indirect' Qatar Talks with Iran Conclude Quietly, with No Breakthrough on Strait of Hormuz. Indirect talks between U.S. and Iranian representatives in Doha, Qatar, concluded on Wednesday, seemingly without a breakthrough on crucial issues like freedom of navigation through the Strait of Hormuz, although mediators from Qatar and Pakistan insisted “positive progress” was made.

The post ‘Indirect’ Qatar Talks with Ira. Al Jazeera: Iran warns ships against using unapproved routes in Strait of Hormuz.

Al Jazeera reports that military command issues threat a day after Qatari mediators hailed 'positive progress' in indirect US-Iranian talks.

stories.title: Nine Thai monks killed after 11-year-old driver collides with procession
stories.summary:
Nine Thai monks killed after 11-year-old driver collides with procession. The group of 35 monks and five lay followers were walking by the roadside when the truck ploughed into them.

Al Jazeera: Nine Buddhist monks killed by child driving truck in Thailand.

Al Jazeera reports that nine Buddhist monks were killed after a truck driven by an 11-year-old boy struck a pilgrimage procession in Thailand.

stories.title: FDA clears the way for additional bivalent boosters for certain vulnerable individuals
stories.summary: FDA clears the way for additional bivalent boosters for certain vulnerable individuals. The U.S. Food and Drug Administration amended the terms of its emergency use authorizations for the Pfizer and Moderna bivalent vaccines on Tuesday, allowing people ages 65 and older and certain people with weakened immunity to get additional doses before this fall's vaccination campaigns.

stories.title: Secret Service member was Googling rooftop location of Trump’s would-be assassin when shots rang out in Butler, Pa.: DHS report
stories.summary:
Secret Service member was Googling rooftop location of Trump’s would-be assassin when shots rang out in Butler, Pa.: DHS report. The report concluded Secret Service “missed multiple opportunities to detect, prevent, and disrupt” deranged gunman Thomas Crooks’ attempted assassination of Trump, including shocking communications failures that resulted in the president’s protective detail never being warned that an armed man had climbed onto the American Glass Research International (AGR) complex’s roof just 155 yards from the...

Fox News: Secret Service missed 'multiple opportunities' to prevent Trump assassination attempt: watchdog. Fox News reports that the Secret Service missed 102 radio transmissions about Thomas Crooks on the roof with a long gun before shots were fired at the Butler rally, according to a watchdog report.

stories.title: Kamala Harris Courts Mamdani To Shore Up Support For Potential 2028 Run
stories.summary:
Kamala Harris Courts Mamdani To Shore Up Support For Potential 2028 Run. Former Vice President Kamala Harris is courting New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani and other prominent left-wing figures as she lays the groundwork for a possible 2028 presidential campaign, according to a new report.

Axios reported Wednesday that Harris privately called Mamdani last week to discuss the future of the Democratic Party and plans to ... Breitbart: Report: Kamala Harris Courts Mamdani, Pro-Palestinian Activists Ahead of Possible 2028 Run.

Breitbart reports that former Vice President Kamala Harris has been privately contacting progressive Democrats, pro-Palestinian activists, former aides, and other party figures ahead of a possible 2028 White House run, according to a report from Axios.

The post Report: Kamala Harris Courts Mamdani, Pro-Palestinian Activists Ahead of Possible 2028 Run.

stories.summary:

“New York: it’s hot out there, and the power grid is working overtime to keep us cool. ...

Breitbart: Nolte: Zohran Mamdani Tells New Yorkers to Set Thermostat at 78 During Heat Wave.

stories.title: As an Australian Jew who publicly supports Palestinian freedom, I’m targeted by my own community – and neo-Nazis | Sarah Schwartz
stories.summary:
As an Australian Jew who publicly supports Palestinian freedom, I’m targeted by my own community – and neo-Nazis | Sarah Schwartz. Jews should be able to criticise the actions of Israel without risking exclusion from communal life As a teenager, I walked through concentration camps in Poland, where the Nazis industrialised the murder of European Jewry.

That history has shaped not only my Jewish identity, but a commitment to political struggle. It taught me that memory carries not only grief, but obligations: to resist racism, dehumanisation and the silence that permits the erasure of a people.

Today, I.

stories.summary:
Doubt that Elon Musk ‘earned’ his trillion? Rightwing media says you’re in an ‘impotent envy cult’ | Arwa Mahdawi.

The lovefest from Musk’s conservative fans completely overlooks the unscrupulous tactics behind his immense wealth For 12 glorious days in June, Elon Musk experienced something nobody else in the history of humankind has ever experienced: trillionaire status.

Did all those zeros make Musk happy? Did the army of children he has sired love him more?

Did he find inner peace? We’ll never know b.

stories.title: Rapid spread of AI may worsen global inequality, UN warns
stories.summary: Rapid spread of AI may worsen global inequality, UN warns. Panel proses shared framework for responsible AI development as adoption grows unevenly across world A new United Nations report warns that the development of artificial intelligence may exacerbate global inequality and proposes a shared framework for how to responsibly develop AI, as adoption and investment into the technology accelerates unevenly.

stories.title: Ombudsman files plunder case vs Marcoleta in Sandiganbayan
stories.summary:
Ombudsman files plunder case vs Marcoleta in Sandiganbayan. MANILA, Philippines — The Office of the Ombudsman filed before the Sandiganbayan the plunder case against Sen. Rodante Marcoleta and his co-accused over a P75 million campaign donation to him.

In January 2025, former Anakalusugan Rep. Mike Defensor, and certain Aristotle Viray and Joseph Espiritu allegedly donated P30 million, P25 million and P20 million for Marcoleta’s senatorial bid. According.

Rappler: Ombudsman files plunder case vs Marcoleta over P75-M campaign donation. Rappler reports that (2nd UPDATE) A source tells Rappler that the Ombudsman found evidence of alleged conspiracy between Senator Rodante Marcoleta and his fellow respondents.

stories.title: LTO defends traffic enforcer berated by Edsa protesters
stories.summary:
LTO defends traffic enforcer berated by Edsa protesters. MANILA, Philippines — The Land Transportation Office (LTO) on Thursday asked the public to respect its enforcers after a viral video showed one of its personnel being confronted by several people, including a Quezon City councilor, during the Iglesia ni Cristo surprise rally on Tuesday.

In a statement, the LTO said the video showed an. Rappler: QC Council probes councilor over LTO confrontation during INC rally.

Rappler reports that during the Iglesia ni Cristo rally, Quezon City District 2 Councilor Ranulfo Ludovica points his finger at an enforcer issuing traffic ticket to illegally parked vehicles and calls him 'tuta'.

stories.title: Pagasa: Generally fair weather, localized rains this weekend
stories.summary:
Pagasa: Generally fair weather, localized rains this weekend. MANILA, Philippines — Generally fair weather with localized rain showers are expected to prevail over the country this weekend as former Tropical Storm Henry (international name Maysak) moves further away, according to the state weather bureau.

Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (Pagasa) weather specialist Obet Badrina said during its 5 a.m. weather advisory.

stories.title: Marcos hails raised PH income status as ‘a vote of confidence’
stories.summary:

stories.title: 3-day INC rally peaceful despite ‘minor incidents’ on 1st day
stories.summary:

stories.title: Germany's Economic Model Is Broken, and No One Has a Plan B
stories.summary:
Germany's Economic Model Is Broken, and No One Has a Plan B. The country is focused on exports, but China is slowing imports and U.S. tariff threats are growing.

Politicians are offering few alternatives.
